title: An empty people result is a normal completed outcome — not an error, not a retry trigger
summary: Each mode has a legitimate empty case: profile mode returns nothing for a private/closed profile (status 'unavailable'); search mode returns no hits for a niche query or thin SERP coverage; company mode returns employees_count 0 for a page with no public roster or a wrong/slug-mismatched URL. All three complete with status 'completed' and an empty payload — that is success with no data, not a failure. Check the mode-appropriate container before telling the user a person/roster is 'missing'.
references: docs/services/spiderpeople/LEARNINGS.md:140-148 — 'Bright Data returns empty profile' (private) + 'Apify returns 0 employees' (slug not URL)
